---
title: "NYC Flights Big Data Analysis"
author:
  - "Thomas Mason"
  - "Will Anan"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
  word_document: default
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)

library(tidyverse)
library(nycflights13)
library(lubridate)
library(cluster)
library(arules)
library(arulesViz)
library(ggplot2)
library(GGally)
```

```{r}
# 1. Load and merge datasets

# Flights data
flights_df <- nycflights13::flights %>%
  select(
    year, month, day, dep_delay, arr_delay, carrier,
    air_time, distance, origin, time_hour
  )

# Weather data: aggregate to one row per time_hour to avoid many-to-many join
weather_df <- nycflights13::weather %>%
  select(time_hour, temp, wind_speed, visib) %>%
  group_by(time_hour) %>%
  summarise(
    temp       = mean(temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    wind_speed = mean(wind_speed, na.rm = TRUE),
    visib      = mean(visib, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups    = "drop"
  )

# Merge flight and weather data
df <- flights_df %>%
  left_join(weather_df, by = "time_hour") %>%
  drop_na(dep_delay, arr_delay, air_time, distance, temp, wind_speed, visib) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier  = as.factor(carrier),
    month    = as.numeric(month),
    delay_cat = case_when(
      arr_delay <= 0  ~ "On Time",
      arr_delay <= 30 ~ "Minor Delay",
      arr_delay >  30 ~ "Major Delay"
    )
  )

# Quick structure checks
str(df)
summary(df$arr_delay)
```


```{r}
# Linear regression: arrival delay as a function of flight + weather features
reg_model <- lm(
  arr_delay ~ dep_delay + air_time + distance +
    temp + wind_speed + visib + carrier,
  data = df
)

summary(reg_model)
```

```{r}
# Select numeric variables for clustering
cluster_data <- df %>%
  select(dep_delay, arr_delay, air_time, distance, temp, wind_speed, visib) %>%
  scale()

set.seed(123)
k <- kmeans(cluster_data, centers = 3)

df$cluster <- as.factor(k$cluster)

# Cluster visualization: arrival vs departure delay colored by cluster
ggplot(df, aes(x = arr_delay, y = dep_delay, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Flight Delay Clusters",
    x = "Arrival Delay (minutes)",
    y = "Departure Delay (minutes)",
    color = "Cluster"
  )
```

```{r}
# Prepare data for association rules: delay category and carrier
df_arules <- df %>% 
  select(delay_cat, carrier) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.factor))

# (Optional) sample down if machine is slow
# set.seed(123)
# df_arules <- df_arules %>% sample_n(50000)

transactions <- as(df_arules, "transactions")

# Mine association rules
rules <- apriori(
  transactions,
  parameter = list(supp = 0.01, conf = 0.5)
)

# Inspect first few strongest rules (by lift)
inspect(head(sort(rules, by = "lift")))
```

```{r}
# Histogram of arrival delays
ggplot(df, aes(x = arr_delay)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 60) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Arrival Delays",
    x = "Arrival Delay (minutes)",
    y = "Count"
  )
```

```{r}
# Weather impact on delays: Temperature vs Arrival Delay
ggplot(df, aes(x = temp, y = arr_delay)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.25) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Temperature vs Arrival Delay",
    x = "Temperature (°F)",
    y = "Arrival Delay (minutes)"
  )
```

```{r}
# Boxplot of arrival delays by month
ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(month), y = arr_delay)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Arrival Delay by Month",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Arrival Delay (minutes)"
  )
```

```{r}
# Average delay by carrier
df %>%
  group_by(carrier) %>%
  summarise(avg_delay = mean(arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(avg_delay) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(carrier, avg_delay), y = avg_delay)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Carrier",
    y = "Average Arrival Delay (minutes)",
    title = "Average Arrival Delay by Carrier"
  )
```

```{r}
# Scatterplot matrix for delays and weather variables (sampled for performance)
weather_vars <- df %>%
  select(arr_delay, dep_delay, temp, wind_speed, visib)

set.seed(123)
weather_sample <- weather_vars %>%
  sample_n(5000)   # reduce further (e.g., 2000) if knitting is still slow

GGally::ggpairs(weather_sample) +
  theme_minimal()
```
